records.title: Carlo Ancelotti vows to start 'new cycle' after Brazil's World Cup exit
records.description: Brazil coach Carlo Ancelotti said he's looking to oversee a "new cycle" with the team after they crashed out of the World Cup on Sunday in the round of 16.

records.title: Pochettino says U.S. 'punished enough' for Balogun red card
records.description: United States manager Mauricio Pochettino praised FIFA's decision to lift the suspension on U.S. forward Folarin Balogun, saying the USMNT was "punished enough" by having to play shorthanded against Bosnia-Herzegovina for 35 minutes.

records.title: Belgium furious over suspension of Balogun ban: It's April Fools'
records.description: Belgium coach Rudi Garcia said he thought it was a joke when he first heard news that suspended United States striker Folarin Balogun was cleared to play in the Americans' round-of-16 match.

home.source_policy: confirmed injury requires FIFA official article; probable injury requires media article; otherwise unknown

records.title: Nobody benefits from FIFA letting Balogun off the hook -- not even the USMNT
records.description: The U.S. will be buzzing to have Folarin Balogun available vs. Belgium on Monday, but FIFA's U-turn on his suspension is a bad look for this World Cup

records.title: Folarin Balogun channels Michael Jackson after red card suspended
records.description: Balogun posted a clever message on social media after FIFA's disciplinary committee suspended his red card, making him available to play against Belgium.

records.title: Belgium furious over suspension of Balogun ban: It's April Fools'
records.description: Belgium coach Rudi Garcia said he thought it was a joke when he first heard news that suspended United States striker Folarin Balogun was cleared to play in the Americans' round-of-16 match.
